translations.### NSTextList 或 NSTextTab 實現列表縮排方法探究\n\: ### Exploring List Indentation Methods Using NSTextList or NSTextTab
translations.### [iOS] NSAttributedString 探究使用 NSText: ### [iOS] Exploring NSAttributedString: Using NSTextList or NSTextTab to Implement List Indentation
translations.#### 方法(1) 使用 NSTextList 實現列表縮排方法探究\n\n: #### Method (1) Exploring List Indentation Using NSTextList
translations.#### 方法(2) 使用 NSTextTab 實現列表縮排方法探究\n\n: #### Method (2) Exploring List Indentation Using NSTextTab
translations.- Cannot control the left and right spac:
- Cannot control the left and right spacing of the bullet points

- Cannot customize bullet symbols; numbered items cannot include a `.` like `1.`

- It was found that if the parent list is an unordered item (e.g., `.circle`), and the child list is an ordered numeric item (e.g., `.decimal`), the child item's `startingItemNumber` setting will be ignored.
translations.- It is now possible to perfectly conver:
- It is now possible to perfectly convert HTML List Items into NSAttributedString objects in **[ZMarkupParser](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser){:target="_blank"} ~> `v1.9.4`** and later versions.

- Support Line Breaks While Maintaining Indentation

- Support Custom Indentation Spacing Size

- Support Nested Structure Indentation

- Support different List Item Styles, such as Bullet, Disc, Decimal… and even custom symbols
translations.- The `tabStops` array corresponds to ea:
- The `tabStops` array corresponds to each `\t` character in the text. `NSTextTab` can set the alignment direction and location (**note this is the position in the text, not the width!**)

- `headIndent` sets the position from the starting point for lines after the first one, usually set to the location of the second `\t` so that wrapped lines align with the bullet.

- `defaultTabInterval` sets the default interval spacing for `\t`. If there are additional `\t` characters in the text, their spacing will follow this setting.

- `location:` Since NSTextTab specifies direction and position, you need to calculate the position yourself; you must calculate the bullet width (the number of digits also affects this) + spacing + the parent item's indentation distance to achieve the effect shown above.

- Item bullets are fully customizable.

- If the `location` is incorrect or cannot be matched, a direct line break will occur.
translations.- To increase visibility, display at lis: - To increase visibility, display at list item position 8.
translations.- Use `\\n` to separate each list item\n:
- Use `\n` to separate each list item

- Using `\tbullet\t` is intended to let `attributedString.string` return the list result when accessing the plain text string.

- `\tBullet\t` will not be displayed, so any changes after the bullet will not appear (e.g., adding `.` will not affect the display).
translations.- We declare a simple `ListItem` object:
- We declare a simple `ListItem` object to encapsulate sublist items, using recursion to combine and calculate the spacing and content of the list items.

- `NSTextList` only uses the `marker` method to generate list symbols, but you can choose not to use it and implement your own.

- To increase the width before and after the bullet, you can directly set `preIndent` and `sufIndent`.

- Because position calculation requires using the `Font` to measure width, the text needs to have `.font` set to ensure accurate calculation.
translations.- [ObjC String Rendering](https://www.ob:
- [ObjC String Rendering](https://www.objc.io/issues/9-strings/string-rendering/){:target="_blank"} / [ObjC China — String Rendering](https://store.objccn.io/issue-9-5/){:target="_blank"}
  This article offers complete examples of using NSAttributedString, including list and table implementations.
translations.> The goal was achieved, but I still hav: > The goal was achieved, but I still haven't fully mastered `NSTextTab` (e.g., different directions? Relative position of Location?). Official documentation and online resources are very limited, so I'll study it more when I have the chance.
translations.NSTextList 能做的、可以做的就如同上述，在實際產品開發應用上並不是那麼: What NSTextList can do is as described above, but it is not very practical for actual product development; the spacing is too wide, and numbered items lack a `.` which greatly reduces usability. Online, I only found [a method to change spacing via TextKit NSTextStorage](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/66714650/nstextlist-formatting){:target="_blank"}, but I think this approach is too hard-coded, so I gave up. The only advantage is that you can easily add nested indented sublists by appending to the textLists array without having to calculate complex layout issues.
translations.NSTextTab 可以讓我們設定 `\\t` Tab 的佔位 **位置** ，: NSTextTab allows us to set the **position** of the `\t` tab placeholder, with a default interval of `28`.
translations.[ObjC String Rendering](https://www.objc:
[ObjC String Rendering](https://www.objc.io/issues/9-strings/string-rendering/){:target="_blank"} / [ObjC China — String Rendering](https://store.objccn.io/issue-9-5/){:target="_blank"}
This article provides complete examples of NSAttributedString usage, including implementations of lists and tables.
translations.`NSTextList` 只使用 `marker` 方法產生列表符號，也可以不使: `NSTextList` only uses the `marker` method to generate list symbols, but you can choose not to use it and implement your own.
translations.`NSTextList` 提供的 Public API 非常稀少，能控制的參數也: `NSTextList` provides very few public APIs, and the controllable parameters are limited to these:
translations.`\\t項目符號\\t` 不會顯示出來，因此在項目符號後做什麼加工都不會顯示 (: `\tBullet\t` will not be displayed, so any modification after the bullet will not show (e.g., adding `.` will not affect the display).
translations.```swift\nlet listLevel1ParagraphStyle =:
```swift
let listLevel1ParagraphStyle = NSMutableParagraphStyle()
listLevel1ParagraphStyle.textLists = [textListLevel1]
        
let listLevel2ParagraphStyle = NSMutableParagraphStyle()
listLevel2ParagraphStyle.textLists = [textListLevel1, textListLevel2]
        
let attributedString = NSMutableAttributedString()
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 1))\tList Level 1 - 1 StringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringString\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 2))\tList Level 1 - 2\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 3))\tList Level 1 - 3\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel2.marker(forItemNumber: 1))\tList Level 2 - 1\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel2ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel2.marker(forItemNumber: 2))\tList Level 2 - 2 StringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringString\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel2ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 4))\tList Level 1 - 4\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))        

textView.attributedText = attributedString
```
translations.```swift\nlet textListLevel1 = NSTextLis:
```swift
let textListLevel1 = NSTextList(markerFormat: .decimal, startingItemNumber: 1)
let textListLevel2 = NSTextList(markerFormat: .circle, startingItemNumber: 1)
        
let listLevel1ParagraphStyle = NSMutableParagraphStyle()
listLevel1ParagraphStyle.defaultTabInterval = 28
listLevel1ParagraphStyle.headIndent = 29
listLevel1ParagraphStyle.tabStops = [
  NSTextTab(textAlignment: .left, location: 8), // Corresponds to setting in image (1) Location
  NSTextTab(textAlignment: .left, location: 29), // Corresponds to setting in image (2) Location
]
        
let listLevel2ParagraphStyle = NSMutableParagraphStyle()
listLevel2ParagraphStyle.defaultTabInterval = 28
listLevel2ParagraphStyle.headIndent = 44
listLevel2ParagraphStyle.tabStops = [
    NSTextTab(textAlignment: .left, location: 29), // Corresponds to setting in image (3) Location
    NSTextTab(textAlignment: .left, location: 44), // Corresponds to setting in image (4) Location
]
        
let attributedString = NSMutableAttributedString()
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 1)).\tList Level 1 - 1 StringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringString\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 2)).\tList Level 1 - 2\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 3)).\tList Level 1 - 3\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel2.marker(forItemNumber: 1))\tList Level 2 - 1\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel2ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel2.marker(forItemNumber: 2))\tList Level 2 - 2 StringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringStringString\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel2ParagraphStyle]))
attributedString.append(NSAttributedString(string: "\t\(textListLevel1.marker(forItemNumber: 4)).\tList Level 1 - 4\n", attributes: [.paragraphStyle: listLevel1ParagraphStyle]))

textView.attributedText = attributedString
```

translations.`defaultTabInterval` 設定預設 `\\t` 的 Interv: `defaultTabInterval` sets the default interval spacing for `\t`. If there are additional `\t` characters in the text, their spacing will follow this setting.
translations.`headIndent` 設定第二行開始距離起始點的位置，通常設為第二個 `\\: `headIndent` sets the position from the starting point for lines after the first one, usually set to the location of the second `\t` so that wrapped lines align with the bullet.
translations.`location:` 因為 NSTextTab 是指定方向與位置的，因此需要自: `location:` Since NSTextTab specifies direction and position, you need to calculate the position yourself; you must calculate the bullet width (the number of digits also affects this) + spacing + the parent item's indentation distance to achieve the effect shown above.
translations.`tabStops` Array 會對應文本中的每一個 `\\t` 符號， `N: The `tabStops` array corresponds to each `\t` character in the text. `NSTextTab` can set the alignment direction and location ( **note this is the position in the text, not the width!** )
translations.iOS Swift 使用 NSAttributedString 的 NSText: iOS Swift Using NSAttributedString's NSTextList or NSTextTab to Achieve HTML-Like List OL/UL/LI Indentation Functionality
translations.一個幫你把 HTML String 轉換成 NSAttributedString: A small tool that converts HTML String into NSAttributedString, supporting custom style specifications and custom tag features.
translations.一開始奢望可以直接使用 NSTextList 就能達成，但效果跟客製化程度都很差: At first, I hoped to achieve this directly using NSTextList, but the results and customization options were poor. In the end, I had to rely on a DIY approach with NSTextTab, controlling the position of `\t` to combine the list symbols manually. It's a bit troublesome, but the effect perfectly meets the requirements!
translations.上面的範例為了讓大家理解 `NSTextTab` 排版的方式，因此直接簡化了計算: The above example simplifies the calculation process to help everyone understand how `NSTextTab` layout works by directly providing the results. For real-world use, you can refer to the complete code below:
translations.之前在開發我的開源專案「 [ZMarkupParser](https://git: Previously, while developing my open-source project "[ZMarkupParser](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser){:target="_blank"}," a library for converting HTML strings into NSAttributedString objects, I needed to study and implement different HTML components purely using NSAttributedString. That was when I first encountered the `.paragraphStyle: NSParagraphStyle` attributes `textLists: [NSTextList]` and `tabStops: [NSTextTab]`. These are two very obscure properties with scarce information available online.
translations.使用 `\\n` 區別每個列表項目\n: Use `\n` to separate each list item
Using `\tbullet\t` aims to allow `attributedString.string` to return the list result when accessing the plain text string.
translations.因為需要計算位置，要使用 `Font` 來計算寬度，所以文字需要設定 `.fon: Because position calculation requires using the `Font` to measure width, the text needs to have `.font` set to ensure accurate calculation.
translations.如上圖所示，列表支援多層巢狀結構，並且需要照層級縮排。\n\n: As shown in the above image, the list supports multiple nested levels and requires indentation according to the level.
translations.如上圖效果很差，因為其實是自己用空白跟符號 `－` 手動排版， **無縮排效果*: The effect in the above image is poor because it is manually formatted using spaces and the symbol `－`, with **no indentation effect**. The only advantage is that the spacing consists of space characters, allowing you to control the size.
translations.如果 `location` 有誤或無法符合，會出現直接的斷行\n: If the `location` is incorrect or cannot be matched, a direct line break will occur.
translations.我們宣告一個簡單的 `ListItem` 物件封裝子列表項目，透過遞迴組合、計算: We declare a simple `ListItem` object to encapsulate sublist items, using recursion to combine and calculate the spacing and content of the list items.
translations.我們透過設定 `NSMutableParagraphStyle` 的 `tabS: We achieve a list-like effect by setting `NSMutableParagraphStyle`'s `tabStops` + `headIndent` + `defaultTabInterval`.
translations.支持不同 List Item Style 列表樣式，如 Bullet, Disc: Support different List Item Styles, such as Bullet, Disc, Decimal… and even custom symbols
translations.支持換行保持縮排\n: Support Line Breaks While Maintaining Indentation
translations.是「或」不是「與」 `NSTextList` 和 `NSTextTab` 沒有一: It is "or," not "and." `NSTextList` and `NSTextTab` are not used together; each can independently achieve list indentation functionality.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有發現若母項目列表是非有序項目 (如： `.cicrle` )，子項目是有序數字: It was found that if the parent list is an unordered item (e.g., `.circle`), and the child list is an ordered numeric item (e.g., `.decimal`), the child item's `startingItemNumber` setting will be ignored.
translations.為增加識別度，以項目列表位置 8 展示。\n: To increase visibility, display at list item position 8.
translations.無法客製化項目符號、數字項目無法加上 `.` -&gt; `1.`\n: Cannot customize bullet symbols; numbered items cannot include a `.` like `1.`
translations.無法控制項目符號左右間距大小\n: Cannot control the left and right spacing of the bullet points
translations.照慣例先上最終成果圖。\n\n: As usual, here is the final result image.
It is now possible to perfectly convert HTML List Items into NSAttributedString objects in **[ZMarkupParser](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser){:target="_blank"} ~> `v1.9.4`** and later versions.
translations.當初在實現 HTML 列表縮排轉換時，就查到範例可以使用這兩個屬性來達成，先來看: When implementing HTML list indentation conversion, I found examples using these two properties to achieve it. First, let's look at the nested tag structure of HTML list indentation:
translations.目的達成了，但依然沒有完全掌握 `NSTextTab` 的知識(例如: 不同方向: The goal was achieved, but I still haven't fully mastered `NSTextTab` (e.g., different directions? Relative position of Location?). Official documentation and online resources are very limited, so I'll study it more when I have the chance.
translations.要加寬項目符號前後寬度可直接透過設置 `preIndent` , `sufInd: To increase the width before and after the bullet, you can directly set `preIndent` and `sufIndent`.
translations.這件事就這樣不了了之了，開源了一年多也沒特別去改他；直到最近陸續收到希望能完善: This matter was left unresolved, and after more than a year of open source, I didn't make any special changes to it. Until recently, I started receiving [Issues](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser/issues){:target="_blank"} requesting improved List conversion, and a developer provided a [solution PR](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser/pull/60){:target="_blank"}. By referring to the `NSParagraphStyle` usage in that PR, I gained new insights. Studying NSTextList or NSTextTab shows there is a chance to perfectly implement indented lists!
translations.那時候因為還有許多其他 HTML 標籤轉換的工作需要實現，工作量很大；只快速嘗試: At that time, there were many other HTML tag conversions to implement, so the workload was heavy; I only quickly tried to use NSTextList or NSTextTab to create list indentation without deep understanding. The results were unsatisfactory: too much spacing, no alignment, multi-line issues, unclear nested structure, and no control over spacing. After a brief attempt without finding a solution, I gave up and temporarily used a makeshift layout:
